name: io.github.ohneben/anytype-mcp
description: Self-hosted Anytype MCP server (Docker + Streamable HTTP).

environment_variables.name: ANYTYPE_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your Anytype API key (Anytype -> Settings -> API Keys).

environment_variables.name: ANYTYPE_API_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Where the Anytype desktop API is reachable from the container. Default: http://host.docker.internal:31009

environment_variables.name: MCP_SHARED_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Optional bearer token required on the /mcp endpoint. Empty = open (localhost only).
